title: phyllanthus elegans
intro: Phyllanthus elegans is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly known as the 'Naked Phyllanthus'. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat a variety of health conditions. The health benefits of Phyllanthus elegans include reducing fever, alleviating liver and kidney disorders, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus elegans include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
